'''Kevzod Stenir''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who served as the [[Fourth Assistant Attorney General]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. For several [[Standard year/Legends|years]] when the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] started, he had been prosecuting legal cases against the [[Commerce Guild/Legends|Commerce Guild]].

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|56|business/13516_1.html|Antitrust Suits Dropped in Light of Separation}} {{1stm}}
